  • Uses of Invoice in kf

    Methods in kf that return types with arguments of type Invoice
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ArrayList<Invoice>
    Parser.toInvoices(ArrayList<InvoiceItem> extraItems, ArrayList<InvoiceItem> forAllList, ArrayList<InvoiceItem> discountList)
    Converts the parsed CSV data into a list of Invoice objects.

  • Uses of Invoice in kf.api

    Methods in kf.api with parameters of type Invoice
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    Api.sendInvoice(Invoice invoice)
    Sends an invoice to the Fortnox API using the provided Invoice object.
    HttpResponse<String>
    Api.sendInvoiceTest(Invoice invoice)
    Sends a test invoice to the Fortnox API using the provided Invoice object.
    Method parameters in kf.api with type arguments of type Invoice
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    Api.sendInvoiceList(List<Invoice> invoices)
    Sends a list of invoices to the Fortnox API using the provided List of Invoice objects.
